summary: Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran spoke Monday on CNBC's "Squawk on the Street."

title: 人权高专：中东地区言论自由受限加剧 各国应切实履行国际人权义务
summary: 联合国人权事务高级专员蒂尔克周三表示，人们正在目睹中东地区的公民空间正被急剧“安全化”，各国政府对民众行使言论自由和和平集会权利施加了严厉限制。他警告说，自美国和以色列对伊朗发动袭击以来，中东地区对公民社会空间和言论自由的打压显著加剧。

summary: The winning bidder — along with up to seven guests — will join Buffett and the Currys for an exclusive lunch in Omaha, Nebraska.

title: Warren Buffett says he's still making calls on investments at Berkshire, flags 'tiny' new buy

title: 难民署：黎巴嫩冲突持续一个月，超20万人进入叙利亚
summary: 联合国难民署驻叙利亚代理代表马达伊恩周二在日内瓦向记者表示，自黎巴嫩及该地区冲突加剧以来，一个月内进入叙利亚边境的人数急剧上升。据叙利亚当局统计，3月2日至27日期间，通过三个官方过境点进入叙利亚的人数已超过20万。

title: 以色列通过针对巴勒斯坦人的死刑法，联合国警告此举违反国际法
summary: 联合国人权事务高级专员蒂尔克周二敦促以色列废除其议会于3月30日通过的一项恢复死刑的法律，该法律的适用范围几乎仅限于巴勒斯坦人。蒂尔克强调，该立法违反国际法，具有严重歧视性，威胁平等司法与人权保障。

title: 安理会通报：黎以冲突升级造成严重人道影响 联合国呼吁停火并执行相关决议
summary: 联合国三位高级官员周二在安理会有关黎巴嫩局势的会议上通报指出，随着真主党与以色列在黎以临时边界线“蓝线”沿线及以外地区冲突持续升级，局势已恶化至危险境地，“蓝线”两侧的局势不仅需要最密切关注，更需要采取集体行动。他们指出，冲突升级已对平民、基础设施和人道局势造成严重影响，维和人员安全面临威胁，必须立即停止敌对行动，通过外交途径推动全面执行安理会第1701号决议。

title: 联合国开发计划署：军事升级威胁伊朗人类发展成果
summary: 联合国开发计划署发布初步人类发展影响简报指出，随着军事升级对日常生活和当地经济活动造成干扰，伊朗相当一部分人口可能陷入贫困，相关冲击正在加剧对生计、基本服务及人类发展前景的压力。

title: Three niche commodity prices are surging. What they show about China's grip on supply chains
summary: In the wake of the Iran war, prices are surging for critical elements used in defense and the semiconductors that power artificial intelligence advances.

title: Powell sees inflation outlook in check, no need to hike rates because of oil shock
summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell spoke Monday at Harvard University.

summary: Building and protecting your wealth is more than just making smart investment decisions. Tax planning is also essential.

title: Watch Fed Chair Jerome Powell speak live to an economics class at Harvard
summary: This will be one of Powell's final scheduled public appearances before his term ends in May.

title: 48小时内三名联合国维和人员在黎巴嫩遇难
summary: 尽管中东冲突已持续一个月，但在过去48小时内，联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队已有三名维和人员在该国南部遇难，另有三人受伤，事件发生在以色列与亲伊朗的真主党之间的敌对行动背景下。

title: 货币基金组织博文：中东战争如何影响能源、贸易与金融？
summary: 国际货币基金组织周一在最新博客文章中指出，世界正面临又一次冲击。中东战争正在颠覆该地区及其他地区人们的生活和生计。

title: Top Wall Street analysts like these dividend stocks for solid returns
summary: These stocks that pay dividends consistently have the ability to generate long-term capital appreciation.

summary: 联合国秘书长古特雷斯周日通过发言人发表声明，对当天联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队一名维和人员在以色列与真主党交火期间在黎巴嫩南部阵地内遇害事件予以强烈谴责。在同一事件中，另一名维和人员受重伤。

title: 古特雷斯强烈谴责袭击伊拉克库尔德斯坦自治区总统住所事件
summary: 联合国秘书长古特雷斯周日通过发言人发表声明，对针对伊拉克库尔德斯坦自治区总统巴尔扎尼住所的无人机袭击事件予以强烈谴责。他呼吁立即对此次袭击展开彻底调查，并将肇事者绳之以法。

title: As stocks and bonds fall, and oil hits $100, a futures trade that boomed in 2022 may again be a winner
summary: Managed futures, which track macro themes expected to play out over months, do well when traditional assets are falling. This could be one of those times.

title: Berkshire shares suffer longest losing streak in more than 7 years
summary: Shares of Berkshire Hathaway have lost ground for eight consecutive days. It is their longest losing streak since December of 2018.

title: Sen. Warren rips Federal Reserve chair pick Kevin Warsh: 'You have learned nothing from your failures'
summary: Kevin Warsh's nomination as chair of the Federal Reserve has been in limbo because of a criminal investigation of Chair Jerome Powell.

title: 中东战争第28天：对关键医疗设施的袭击及撤离行动引发担忧
summary: 自以色列和美国对伊朗发动空袭、伊朗随即采取报复行动从而引发更大范围的地区冲突，已经过去了近一个月的时间。联合国机构及合作伙伴周五指出，逃离轰炸的平民“无处可去”，正处于极度恐慌之中。

title: 叙利亚问题调查委员会：苏韦达暴力事件造成1700余人死亡
summary: 由联合国人权理事会设立的叙利亚问题独立国际调查委员会周五发布一份新报告，披露去年7月席卷叙南部苏韦达省的残酷暴力事件已造成1700多人死亡，近20万人被迫流离失所。

title: 人权理事会紧急辩论伊朗校园遇袭：联合国敦促美国尽快公布调查结果
summary: 联合国人权理事会周五举行紧急辩论，聚焦伊朗女子小学遭空袭事件。联合国人权事务高级专员蒂尔克警告称，针对学校的袭击令人震惊，必须展开独立调查并追究责任，同时呼吁各方立即停止冲突升级。

title: Private credit's cracks open door for Wall Street banks' comeback: 'The tug of war is just starting'
summary: Wall Street banks may finally be getting a long-awaited opening to claw back market share from private credit lenders.

title: 中东战争第27天：局势外溢效应加剧 联合国警告全球粮食与健康风险上升
summary: 随着中东局势持续紧张，联合国多家机构周四警告称，冲突影响正迅速外溢，不仅加剧地区安全与人道压力，也对全球粮食体系和公共卫生构成日益严峻的威胁。

title: Economic Issues to Watch in 2026: Middle East Conflict Spillover Effects
summary: Brookings专家分析2026年关键经济议题，重点关注中东冲突的溢出效应：从能源供应链到全球通胀，从新兴市场脆弱性到国际货币体系变化。建议各国加强宏观审慎框架。

title: The research firm whose AI paper knocked the whole stock market is out with another big call
summary: Citrini Research said persistently high energy prices risk weighing on consumers and corporate earnings, creating a tough backdrop for equities.

title: IMF Statement on the Middle East: Closely Monitoring Developments
summary: IMF is closely monitoring developments in the Middle East, observing disruptions to trade and economic activity, surges in energy prices, and volatility in financial markets. Analysis suggests the conflict could shape the global economy.

title: 人权理事会紧急辩论：中东冲突或将引发全球灾难
summary: 位于日内瓦的联合国人权理事会周三就“伊朗在海湾地区的打击行动”举行紧急辩论。联合国人权事务高级专员蒂尔克警告称，各国正徘徊在一场无可缓解的灾难边缘。面对中东“极其危险且难以预测”的局势，他呼吁立即结束冲突。

title: 中东战争第26天：古特雷斯警告局势已失控

title: World has 'never experienced' soaring refining margins like this, TotalEnergies CEO tells CNBC
summary: TotalEnergies CEO Patrick Pouyanné on the Iran war, the $1 billion deal with the White House, investment in the U.S., and more.

title: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.

title: 中东战争第25天：联合国机构加强人道应对行动
summary: 中东局势持续恶化，冲突升级正加剧人道危机，对平民生活、基础设施和公共服务体系造成严重冲击。联合国机构加紧提供人道主义援助，防止局势进一步恶化。

title: 联合国报告：以色列定居点扩张加剧 公然无视安理会决议
summary: 联合国中东和平进程副特别协调员阿拉克巴罗夫周二在安理会表示，以色列定居点扩张仍在快速推进，非法前哨点不断增多，并采取措施推动吞并约旦河西岸。他强调，联合国秘书长谴责以色列在西岸“持续不断”的定居点扩张。

title: RAND Analysis: Strategic Implications of Strait of Hormuz Disruption
summary: RAND Corporation发布战略分析报告，评估霍尔木兹海峡中断对全球能源安全和军事战略的影响。报告分析了替代航线、能源储备充足度以及各方战略博弈态势。

title: Apollo gives investors only 45% of requested withdrawals from $15 billion private credit fund
summary: The withdrawals show that Apollo didn't avoid the rush of investor redemptions plaguing rivals, driven by concern over private credit loans to software firms.

title: Volume in stock and oil futures surged minutes before Trump's market-turning post
summary: The timing of the earlier volume spikes — across both equities and crude — caught the attention of traders.

title: Fed's Goolsbee says he's worried about inflation in 'fraught but intense' climate
summary: In a CNBC interview, the central banker said policymaking is difficult in the current environment.

title: BlackRock’s Larry Fink warns against market timing, says missing best days can halve returns
summary: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink said staying invested through periods of turmoil has historically delivered far stronger returns.

title: 中东战争第24天：联黎部队遇袭 流离失所加剧 多重危机加深
summary: 在过去48小时内，联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队位于纳古拉镇的总部附近发生激烈的枪击和爆炸。期间，子弹、弹片和碎片击中联黎部队总部内的建筑物及空旷区域，对维和人员构成威胁。联合国再次呼吁各方局势降级，并尊重联合国场所和财产的不可侵犯。

title: Global Economic Resilience 'Tested Yet Again' by Middle East War, Says IMF Chief
summary: IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva warned that global economic resilience is being tested by the Middle East conflict. She emphasized the need for coordinated policy responses to mitigate spillover effects on developing economies.

title: World Bank: MENA Region Faces Severe Economic Disruption from Escalating Conflict
summary: 世界银行发布最新评估报告，指出中东北非地区面临冲突升级带来的严重经济中断。报告强调霍尔木兹海峡通行量骤降94%对全球贸易的深远影响，预计该地区GDP增长率将大幅下调。

title: Wealthy consumers are turning to jewelry as an investment, especially colored gemstones
summary: Lofty gold prices and market volatility are pushing wealthy consumers toward jewelry, especially rare colored gemstones, as handbags lose appeal.

title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about the long-term prospects of these 3 stocks
summary: Amid elevated tensions in the Middle East, top analysts say investors should hold these 3 names for a strong long-term return.

title: 中国社科院：中东局势对全球经济格局的深远影响
source: 中国社科院西亚非洲所
summary: 中国社科院西亚非洲研究所发布研究报告，分析中东地缘政治剧变对全球经济格局的深远影响。报告指出，以色列凭借军事和科技力量改变区域平衡，霍尔木兹海峡封锁对中国的能源安全构成严峻挑战。

title: Atlantic Council: How the 2026 Conflict Reshapes Gulf Financial Architecture
summary: 大西洋理事会分析2026年冲突如何重塑海湾金融架构。报告指出主权财富基金面临资产重估压力，区域金融中心竞争格局可能改变，去美元化趋势加速。

title: Buffett defends 'Giving Pledge' against Thiel and 'billionaire backlash'
summary: Warren Buffett is defending the philanthropic initiative he co-founded with Bill Gates almost 15 years ago.

title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
summary: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.

title: Copper joins gold in broad commodities sell-off. There's a worrying reason behind it
summary: After major rallies, metals were under pressure on Thursday as rising oil prices increased both inflation and growth worries.

title: Fed Governor Waller urges caution for now, says rate cuts possible later in the year
summary: Waller said in a CNBC interview that recent developments require a more conservative approach.

title: BIS Quarterly Review: Geopolitical Risk Premium in Global Bond Markets
summary: 国际清算银行季度评估报告分析了全球债券市场中的地缘政治风险溢价。报告指出中东冲突导致避险资金流入美元资产，新兴市场债券利差扩大，全球金融条件趋紧。

title: 中东战争第20天：联合国敦促立即结束冲突 警告核风险浮现
summary: 联合国秘书长古特雷斯周四在布鲁塞尔发出紧急呼吁，敦促尽快结束不断升级的中东战争，警告局势“可能完全失控”，给平民带来巨大苦难，并对全球经济造成严重冲击，尤其是对最不发达国家产生潜在灾难性后果。

title: 加沙拉法口岸部分开放  医疗援助和基本物资仍受严格限制
summary: 联合国人道主义事务协调厅周四证实，连接加沙地带与埃及之间的拉法口岸当天部分恢复开放，这是自2月28日以色列关闭该口岸以来的首次开放。当时正值以色列与美国针对伊朗展开军事行动之际。

title: Carnegie: The Middle East Looks Toward a Grim 2026
summary: 卡内基和平基金会发布年度展望，认为2026年中东前景黯淡。冲突升级、经济衰退风险加剧、地区联盟重组，以及对全球治理体系的冲击，都将是关注焦点。

title: 中东危机第19天：黎巴嫩流离失所者突破百万，核安全问题引发担忧
summary: 中东危机持续发酵，冲突不断，人道主义需求日益迫切。国际原子能机构周三报告称，一枚弹药击中了伊朗布什尔核电站，但未造成人员伤亡。在黎巴嫩，人道主义局势不断恶化，据报道已有数百人丧生，超过100万人流离失所。尽管面临日益严峻的挑战，联合国各机构仍在加大紧急援助力度。

title: OECD Economic Outlook: Middle East Conflict Adds Downside Risks to Global Growth
summary: 经合组织经济展望报告指出，中东冲突给全球经济增长增加了下行风险。报告下调了2026年全球GDP增长预期0.3个百分点，强调供应链中断和能源价格波动对发达经济体通胀的推升效应。

title: CSIS Middle East Program: Assessing the Energy Security Fallout
summary: CSIS中东项目发布能源安全影响评估报告。报告量化了霍尔木兹海峡通行中断对全球原油、LNG和化工品供应的影响，并评估了各国的能源储备充足度和替代方案。

title: 中东危机第18天：秘书长再次强调必须停火
summary: 中东危机持续发酵，据报道该地区各地正发生交火与反击行动，人道主义代价不断攀升。联合国各机构警告称，卫生系统承受的压力与日俱增，儿童日益受到暴力和流离失所的影响，大量民众被迫离开家园——尤其是在黎巴嫩。但尽管后勤和安全方面的挑战日益严峻，联合国各机构仍在加大紧急援助力度。

title: 联合国报告：以色列定居点扩张导致约旦河西岸大规模流离失所
summary: 联合国人权事务高级专员办事处周二发布的一份报告指出，以色列政府加快了在被占领的约旦河西岸（包括东耶路撒冷）推进非法定居点扩张和土地吞并的步伐。

title: 中东战争第17天：危机进入第三周，全球粮食供应链承压
summary: 中东危机已进入第三周，战火仍在持续，人道主义需求不断增加。原油价仍徘徊在每桶100美元以上，而航运中断和航班临时停飞正影响着供应链和旅行。尽管面临日益严峻的挑战，联合国各机构仍在加大紧急援助力度，并警告称，随着战争影响的扩大，流离失所、粮食不安全以及医疗体系承受的压力都在加剧。

title: 中东战争第16天：世卫组织紧急拨款 维和人员再次遇袭
summary: 随着中东冲突持续升级，地区人道需求不断上升。世界卫生组织周日宣布拨款200万美元紧急资金，用于支持黎巴嫩、伊拉克和叙利亚的医疗应对工作。与此同时，部署在黎巴嫩南部的联合国维和人员在巡逻期间再次遭到枪击。

title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on these 3 dividend-paying energy stocks
summary: TipRanks discusses three dividend-paying stocks, including Chord Energy and EOG Resources, that are highlighted by Wall Street's top pros.

title: ADB: How the 2026 Conflict in the Middle East Affects Asia
summary: 亚洲开发银行发布简报分析中东冲突对亚洲的影响。亚太地区发展中国家面临能源进口成本上升和汇款减少的双重压力，ADB宣布提供紧急支持方案。

title: 古特雷斯在贝鲁特呼吁立即停火：黎巴嫩人民不应被拖入战争
summary: 联合国秘书长古特雷斯周六在贝鲁特举行记者会时呼吁冲突各方立即停止战斗，并敦促国际社会加大外交努力与人道援助力度。他强调，黎巴嫩人民并未选择这场战争，“他们被拖入其中”，而该国南部正面临沦为“荒芜之地”的风险。

title: 中东战争第13天：联合国秘书长在战火中的黎巴嫩发起紧急人道主义呼吁
summary: 联合国秘书长古特雷斯周五在对黎巴嫩首都贝鲁特进行声援访问时，宣布启动紧急人道主义筹款行动，筹集3.083亿美元以支援当地平民。据估计，自以色列为应对真主党的火箭弹袭击发动空袭以来，已有超过81万黎巴嫩人在境内流离失所，且这一数字可能还将继续上升。

title: 叙利亚过渡期间侵权行为持续发生，亟待问责与改革
summary: 联合国叙利亚问题独立国际调查委员会周五发布了其最新报告，概述了叙利亚在向包容性治理、法治和问责制过渡过程中取得的进展以及面临的严峻挑战。

title: Palestinians Stream Back to Northern Gaza on Foot
summary: Israel allowed displaced Gazans to begin crossing a military zone that bisects the enclave after a deadlock over hostage releases was broken.

title: Freed Israeli Hostages Still Had Shrapnel in Their Bodies From Oct. 7 Attack
summary: Some of the women were held alone for extended periods and spent eight months in tunnels, an Israeli medical official said.

title: Italy Supports Saudi Arabia Joining Fighter-Jet Program, PM Meloni Says
summary: The U.K., Italy and Japan have already partnered on the Global Combat Air Programme, which aims to put a new stealth fighter with supersonic capability in the skies by 2035.

title: Shippers Wary of Red Sea Routes Despite Houthi Pledge to End Targeting
summary: The world’s top three container operators said they fear instability in Gaza and broader regional tensions mean continued danger.

title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
summary: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

title: Hamas Releases Four Female Israeli Soldiers Under Gaza Cease-Fire Deal
summary: The hostages are the second set to be released since the multiphase agreement came into effect, raising hopes for a lasting end to the war.

title: Hamas Took More Than 200 Hostages From Israel. Here's What We Know.
summary: Israel says 91 hostages abducted on Oct. 7 remain in captivity, including the bodies of at least 34.

title: U.N. and Congolese Troops Struggle to Halt Lightning Rebel Attack
summary: Aid workers estimate as many as 300,000 people are fleeing advances by the Rwandan-backed M23 rebel group, which has taken two strategic towns on the approaches to Goma over the past several days.

title: Who Are the Israeli Hostages Released by Hamas?
summary: Israelis held their breath as four soldiers, all women, were released from the Gaza Strip, the second group to be freed as part of a fragile cease-fire agreement with Hamas.

title: The Latest Gaza Hostages Freed: Women Whose Hamas Warnings Were Ignored
summary: The swap for four soldiers stationed on the border of the Gaza Strip at Nahal Oz follows 15 months of captivity and a campaign by their families.
